---
title: "Harriette McDougall"
---

## Harriette McDougall

**Dates:** (1818–1886)

**Maiden name:** (Bunyon)

### Description

missionary in Sarawak

### Biography

She married (1843) Francis Thomas McDougall.

She was author of  <i>Sketches of our life at Sarawak</i> (1882) and the subject of a 1911 biography by Mary Eliza Bramston.  Her husband was a canon of Winchester and CMY may have met her.

### Letters

- Letter from Feb 6th [1894]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
